title: qualea selloi subsp. pubescens
intro: Qualea selloi subsp. pubescens, also known as the hairy Qualea, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Qualea selloi subsp. pubescens include reducing fever and pain, alleviating inflammation, and promoting digestive health. Qualea selloi subsp. pubescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
